chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 369 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.25 2. For orders on CMA No.1399/2020 3. For hearing of main case 29.09.2025 Mr. Asad Aftab Solangi, advocate for the applicant Under instructions, learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47, of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
